overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from a survival horror game. A character equipped with a headlamp walks through a foggy, snow-covered industrial facility at night, approaching a secure building and using a keycard to gain entry.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered path bordered by metal railings, headlamp beam cutting through the dense fog

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the right side of the snow path
canvas-covered temporary structure partially visible through the fog
tall industrial light pole emitting green-teal illumination
small rectangular concrete structure with dark windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snow-covered path defined by metal railings on the right. Dense fog limits visibility to nearby temporary tent structures and green safety lights on poles. The atmosphere is dark and oppressive with only the character's headlamp and distant industrial lights providing illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered debris

events.description: character briefly turns to look around the surroundings while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: traversing an open snow-covered area, sweeping the headlamp across the terrain while heading toward distant industrial lights

entered.detail: cluster of rocks and debris partially buried in snow
large industrial structure with multiple levels and illuminated windows emerging from the fog

segments.scene_description: Moving from the enclosed path into a wide-open snow field scattered with rocks and debris. The character's headlamp reveals uneven terrain while distant green industrial lights become more prominent ahead. The character briefly surveys the surroundings before continuing toward the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility entrance with metal stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the metal staircase toward the platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the industrial structure and climbing a metal staircase toward a security door, illuminated by green spotlights

entered.detail: metal grated stairs with railings leading up to the facility platform
large industrial door with warning markings and red indicator lights
elevated metal platform with safety railings surrounding the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main industrial facility, moving toward a metal staircase illuminated by intense green spotlights. The structure features an elevated platform with safety railings and a security door at the top. The character begins ascending the stairs, leaving the open snow field behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure facility entrance with access control

events.description: character uses keycard on the access panel to authenticate and unlock the security door

agents.ego_description: approaching the security door and presenting a keycard to the access panel to gain entry

entered.detail: electronic card reader with red warning lights and holographic display

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character approaches the security door on the elevated platform. The area is sheltered from the weather, featuring concrete flooring and red warning lights. The character interacts with an electronic access panel, presenting a keycard to authenticate entry into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded path into the stark, illuminated entrance of a secure industrial facility. It begins along a narrow, snow-covered walkway lined with metal railings and temporary tents, where visibility is restricted to the reach of a headlamp and dim green safety lights. As the path ends, the camera moves out into a wide-open snow field scattered with debris, shifting the perspective to a vast, uneven terrain under the glow of distant industrial beacons. The scene then transitions toward the main facility as the character approaches a metal staircase bathed in intense green spotlights, ascending from the frozen wasteland toward an elevated platform. Finally, the environment shifts to a sheltered concrete landing marked by red warning lights, where the camera focuses on the character using a keycard at an electronic access panel to enter the building.
